claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: The homepage states, "Build, deploy, and monitor AI agents across channels, tools, and data."

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: The link to the Pricing page is available directly on the homepage.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: "Dive into our documentation and kick-start your project with code samples and best practices."

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: "Integrate with existing systems. Use APIs, access business data, and work directly with structured inputs like files, tables, and user records."

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: Our platform adheres to SOC II standards, ensuring the highest level of security for your data through rigorous monitoring and regular audits.
